reason: This is a common hadith (prophetic saying) shared by Muslims that compares worldly life to paradise. It contains no extremist content or ISIS-related messaging.
taxonomy_labels: Religion and Spirituality -> Islamic Teachings and Quotes
original_post: عن سهل بن سعد الساعدي رضي الله عنه قالقال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم« موضع سوط في الجنة خير من الدنيا ومافيها »
